title: The Karma Theme Lyrics From U Turn Tamil 2018 Film
stanzas:
thisai thirumbinalum
kadal mazhai kadanthu ponalum

engae sendraalum.
sagaa... vinai
unnai thodum.

un sirippukku vithai neethaan

orey vidai, neethaan.
ambu vitta vedan neethaan,
ambai thaangum nenjam
neethaan.
manam thirinthinalum!!

kanaa kalaindha pothum

evan varaintha maayam
ivan ival verum aththiyaayam

sagaa.. ....
kaalam theeraathaa .
sagaa... ellai illaa gagaa

thaedi chellum kangal neethaan

pimbam kaattum
paathaai, neethaan.

evan varaintha maayam!!

neeye vithai

mazhai maram neeye.
kizhai neeye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of The Karma Theme?

The Karma Theme explores themes of fate and emotional turmoil, reflecting the struggles of the characters in U Turn.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

The song plays a crucial role in conveying the protagonist's internal conflicts and the consequences of their choices in U Turn.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung and composed by the talented Anirudh, known for his unique musical style.

When was The Karma Theme released?

The song was released on September 3, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Karma Theme from the movie U Turn encapsulates the emotional struggles faced by the characters as they navigate their fates. With its melancholic melody and soothing lyrics, the song evokes a sense of nostalgia and reflection. It serves as a poignant reminder of the choices we make and their consequences. Anirudh's soulful rendition adds depth to the film's narrative, making it a memorable piece in the soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: The Karma Theme from U Turn is a hauntingly beautiful composition by Anirudh that resonates deeply with the soul. The song's ethereal vibe, combined with poignant lyrics by Subu, creates an immersive experience that lingers long after the last note. Dive into this mesmerizing track that perfectly encapsulates the film's emotional essence.
stanzaMeanings: Even if the direction changes, even if the love rain goes away, even if the heart wanders, even if the path is forgotten.
No matter where time goes, fate will always follow you.
You are the seed for the smile, you are the only tear. You are the pain that pierces, you are the heart that endures. Even if the heart wanders!!
When dreams break, something happens to me. The magic that comes is just a trick.
No, time does not end. No, there are no boundaries.
You are the eyes that search, you are what I see in my eyes. You are the one who shows the path, you are the one who leads the way. The magic that comes!!
You are the seed, you are the rain. You are the tree, you are the fruit. You are the seed, you are the rain, you are the tree, you are the fruit.
No matter where time goes, fate will always follow you.
You are the seed, you are the rain. You are the fruit, you are the heart. Even if the heart wanders!!
